positive: A whimsical forest gathering scene featuring stylized woodland creatures—a fox, a bunny, and an owl—playing near a glowing lantern circle. The style is minimalist stained glass illustration mixed with modern pop art, giving strong, clear silhouettes and bold outlines. Composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, designed for an apparel print. Lighting emphasizes deep jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) contrasted sharply with vibrant gold and warm ivory highlights. The mood is magical and comforting, suitable for autumn or nature themes. Clean linework, highly saturated colors, no gradient shading, vector graphic quality.
negative: blur, noise, realistic photography, text, watermark, logo, signature, low resolution, poor anatomy, extra limbs, abstract, messy, grainy, out of focus
